83ec7853 feat(server): reportedWorkers GraphQL query exposes worker_ingest derived view

83ec7853 feat(server): reportedWorkers GraphQL query exposes worker_ingest derived view
commit 83ec78530887aa81ae6eb5db5bcaa0718aff7c0b
Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sun May 3 03:16:49 2026 -0400

    feat(server): reportedWorkers GraphQL query exposes worker_ingest derived view
    
    Surfaces ADR-022 rev 5 §Worker-server interface registry via a new
    reportedWorkers query distinct from the in-process workers query. Each
    entry is classified connected/stale/disconnected by elapsed time since
    last_event_at against the rev-5 30s probe interval. Tracks current_bead
    and current_attempt from the most recent ingested event/backfill.
    
    [.execute-bead-wt-ddx-7b753655-20260503T064620-a387a207-28f710ee]

input.content:
status: already_complete

The bead's implementation was committed as 83ec7853 ("feat(server): reportedWorkers GraphQL query exposes worker_ingest derived view") in a prior execution attempt and merged into main via 185ab68e. The current base-rev (5fe31689) already contains the full implementation:

  - cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql           (reportedWorkers query + ReportedWorker/WorkerFreshness types)
  - cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_reported_workers.go  (resolver reading s.workerIngest snapshot)
  - cli/internal/server/graphql/generated.go             (regenerated gqlgen)
  - cli/internal/server/graphql/models.go                (ReportedWorker + WorkerFreshness models)
  - cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver.go              (resolver wiring)
  - cli/internal/server/reported_workers_adapter.go      (snapshot -> model adapter using freshnessState)
  - cli/internal/server/worker_ingest.go                 (snapshot accessor)
  - cli/internal/server/server.go                        (workerIngest registry handle)
  - cli/internal/server/graphql_reported_workers_test.go (TestGraphQL_Workers_FreshnessFields with connected/stale/disconnected sub-tests + TestGraphQL_Workers_MultipleWorkersPerProject)

The earlier REVIEW:BLOCK note was raised against an attempt whose diff contained only execution-evidence files; the actual feature commit (83ec7853) had already been merged ahead of that review and the BLOCK is stale. All AC items are satisfied in HEAD and the targeted tests pass.

verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/ -run "TestGraphQL_Workers_FreshnessFields|TestGraphQL_Workers_MultipleWorkersPerProject" -count=1

data.text:
The implementation for this bead already landed as commit 83ec7853 (merged via 185ab68e) and is present in the base-rev. All AC artifacts (schema, resolver, adapter, tests, regenerated gqlgen code) exist in HEAD and the targeted tests pass:

```
TestGraphQL_Workers_FreshnessFields            PASS (connected/stale/disconnected)
TestGraphQL_Workers_MultipleWorkersPerProject  PASS
```

Wrote `.ddx/executions/20260503T073505-63909ce0/no_changes_rationale.txt` with `verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/server/ -run "TestGraphQL_Workers_FreshnessFields|TestGraphQL_Workers_MultipleWorkersPerProject" -count=1` so the loop can confirm and close the bead. The prior REVIEW:BLOCK was raised against an evidence-only diff after the feature commit had already merged.
